operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"events":{"Paused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`."},"Unpaused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"assets()":{"details":"Note that the assets() function includes the current balance of assetTokens, this is because deposit()s and withdraw()als in this farm are handled asynchronously, as they have to go through swaps which calldata has to be generated offchain. This farm therefore holds its reserve in 2 tokens, assetToken and ptToken."},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"setCore(address)":{"params":{"newCore":"to reference"}},"unwrapPtToAsset(uint256,bytes)":{"details":"The transaction may be submitted privately to avoid sandwiching, and the function can be called multiple times with partial amounts to help reduce slippage."},"withdraw(uint256,address)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of assets to withdraw","to":"Address to receive the withdrawn assets"}},"wrapAssetToPt(uint256,bytes)":{"details":"The transaction may be submitted privately to avoid sandwiching, and the function can be called multiple times with partial amounts to help reduce slippage.The caller is trusted to not be sandwiching the swap to steal yield."}},"stateVariables":{"_alreadyInterpolatedYield":{"details":"this should be updated everytime we deposit and wrap assets"},"assetToPtUnderlyingOracle":{"details":"e.g. for ptToken = PT-sUSDE-29MAY2025 and assetToken = USDC, this oracle returns the exchange rate of USDE (the underlying token) to USDC. Since USDE has 18 decimals and USDC has 6, and the exchange rate is ~1:1, the oracle should return a value ~= 1e6"}},"title":"Pendle V2 Farm","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"AssetsUpdated(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"emitted when there is a deposit of withdrawal from the farm"},"CoreUpdate(address,address)":{"notice":"emitted when the reference to core is updated"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"assetToPtUnderlyingOracle()":{"notice":"Reference to the oracle for converting value of ptTokens to assetTokens."},"assetToken()":{"notice":"the asset used by deposits and withdrawals in the farm"},"assets()":{"notice":"Returns the total assets in the farm before maturity, the assets are the sum of assets in the farm + assets wrapped + the interpolated yield after maturity, the assets are the sum of the assets() + the value of the PTs based on oracle prices"},"cap()":{"notice":"cap on the amount of assets that can be deposited into the farm"},"core()":{"notice":"address of the Core contract referenced"},"emergencyAction((address,uint256,bytes)[])":{"notice":"due to inflexibility of current smart contracts, add this ability to be able to execute arbitrary calldata against arbitrary addresses. callable only by governor"},"liquidity()":{"notice":"Current liquidity of the farm is the held assetTokens"},"maturity()":{"notice":"Maturity of the Pendle market."},"maxDeposit()":{"notice":"Returns the max deposit amount for the underlying protocol"},"maxSlippage()":{"notice":"Max slippage for depositing and witdhrawing assets from the farm."},"pause()":{"notice":"set pausable methods to paused"},"pendleMarket()":{"notice":"Reference to the Pendle market."},"pendleOracle()":{"notice":"Reference to the Pendle oracle (for PT <-> underlying exchange rates)."},"pendleRouter()":{"notice":"address of the Pendle router used for swaps"},"ptToken()":{"notice":"Reference to the Principal Token of the Pendle market."},"setCap(uint256)":{"notice":"set the deposit cap of the farm"},"setCore(address)":{"notice":"WARNING CALLING THIS FUNCTION CAN POTENTIALLY BRICK A CONTRACT IF CORE IS SET INCORRECTLYset new reference to core only callable by governor"},"setMaxSlippage(uint256)":{"notice":"set the max tolerated slippage for depositing and witdhrawing assets from the farm"},"syToken()":{"notice":"Reference to the SY token of the Pendle market"},"unpause()":{"notice":"set pausable methods to unpaused"},"unwrapPtToAsset(uint256,bytes)":{"notice":"Unwraps PTs to assetTokens."},"withdraw(uint256,address)":{"notice":"withdraw an amount of the asset() from the farm"},"wrapAssetToPt(uint256,bytes)":{"notice":"Wraps assetTokens as PTs."}},"notice":"This contract is used to deploy assets to Pendle ries/CoreRoles.sol":{"keccak256":"0x04aad80842531e50c0caf09665f8cc271ead38f3059408063870e1d43861feb1","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://877879eea263315228be9ccb9546d2cf265da79caa355381b05a381ba4353cbc","dweb:/ipfs/QmdFC4oqqzJU6X49PsEkij66LjHqeGQKeQrniMAnBJjfu3"]}},"version":1}

assets().details: Note that the assets() function includes the current balance of assetTokens, this is because deposit()s and withdraw()als in this farm are handled asynchronously, as they have to go through swaps which calldata has to be generated offchain. This farm therefore holds its reserve in 2 tokens, assetToken and ptToken.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

unwrapPtToAsset(uint256,bytes).details: The transaction may be submitted privately to avoid sandwiching, and the function can be called multiple times with partial amounts to help reduce slippage.

params.to: Address to receive the withdrawn assets

wrapAssetToPt(uint256,bytes).details: The transaction may be submitted privately to avoid sandwiching, and the function can be called multiple times with partial amounts to help reduce slippage.The caller is trusted to not be sandwiching the swap to steal yield.

assetToPtUnderlyingOracle().notice: Reference to the oracle for converting value of ptTokens to assetTokens.

assetToken().notice: the asset used by deposits and withdrawals in the farm

assets().notice: Returns the total assets in the farm before maturity, the assets are the sum of assets in the farm + assets wrapped + the interpolated yield after maturity, the assets are the sum of the assets() + the value of the PTs based on oracle prices

cap().notice: cap on the amount of assets that can be deposited into the farm

core().notice: address of the Core contract referenced

emergencyAction((address,uint256,bytes)[.notice: due to inflexibility of current smart contracts, add this ability to be able to execute arbitrary calldata against arbitrary addresses. callable only by governor

liquidity().notice: Current liquidity of the farm is the held assetTokens

maxDeposit().notice: Returns the max deposit amount for the underlying protocol

maxSlippage().notice: Max slippage for depositing and witdhrawing assets from the farm.

pendleOracle().notice: Reference to the Pendle oracle (for PT <-> underlying exchange rates).

pendleRouter().notice: address of the Pendle router used for swaps

ptToken().notice: Reference to the Principal Token of the Pendle market.

setCap(uint256).notice: set the deposit cap of the farm

setCore(address).notice: WARNING CALLING THIS FUNCTION CAN POTENTIALLY BRICK A CONTRACT IF CORE IS SET INCORRECTLYset new reference to core only callable by governor

setMaxSlippage(uint256).notice: set the max tolerated slippage for depositing and witdhrawing assets from the farm

syToken().notice: Reference to the SY token of the Pendle market

withdraw(uint256,address).notice: withdraw an amount of the asset() from the farm
